title: It Bypassed Livestock for Human Flesh
description: For three years, something stalked the French mountains, ignoring sheep to hunt people with surgical precision. Subscribe to the Department archive.

youtube_metadata.shorts_title: This Beast Ignored 200 Sheep to Hunt One Human...
youtube_metadata.shorts_caption: Between 1764-1767, a creature terrorized France by bypassing entire flocks to target shepherds. What kind of predator chooses humans over livestock? Subscribe for more classified cases.

tiktok_metadata.video_caption:
It walked past sheep to hunt shepherds

For three years in 1760s France, something stalked the mountains with an impossible preference: human flesh over livestock. Musket balls couldn't stop it. Logic couldn't explain it.
